close_reason: Persisted and verified Orange County and north San Diego provider/source IDs; added PublicPurchase support; retained BidNet only as disabled discovery records.
description: Use the existing gnome-company/company resource data as a starting point, then systematically verify and persist agency portal IDs/codes for all Orange County cities, north San Diego County, nearby LA County, and relevant utilities/special districts. Store every endpoint as a ProcurementSource child under its provider parent. Keep BidNet disabled/discovery-only and prefer free canonical PlanetBids, OpenGov, Public Purchase, agency pages, and other direct portals.

comments.text: Used Gnome-Automation/gnome-company 03-operations/lead-sources.md and vsm_leads only as historical checklists; verified current IDs against official pages/live APIs before DB writes. Regional DB now has provider hierarchy counts: PlanetBids OC 29 + SD 5 (all enabled), OpenGov OC 8 + SD 1 (enabled), PublicPurchase SD 1 (disabled pending registration), BidNet OC 3 + SD 5 (all disabled discovery-only). Verified north SD PlanetBids IDs live: Carlsbad 27970, Encinitas/San Dieguito Water 29744, San Marcos 39481, Vallecitos Water 50139, Olivenhain MWD 66222. Added Vista OpenGov cityofvista; official pages for Oceanside, Solana Beach, Del Mar, Poway, Vista Irrigation, Rincon del Diablo MWD, Valley Center MWD, Vallecitos, Santa Fe Irrigation, and Olivenhain. Added PublicPurchase as a supported persisted source type and Del Mar code delmar,ca. Focused tests 8 passed; compile warnings-as-errors and diff check passed.

title: Inventory regional procurement portal IDs
